LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ANITA BARNES MOTION FOR REASONABLE ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION FOR REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SUED UNDER S.F.R.O. SECTION 37.9(A)(8) AND IS THE PREVAILING PARTY, ENTITLING HER TO ATTORNEY FEES. [S.F.R.O. SECTION 37.9(F)]. THE CCP SECTION 998 OFFER DID NOT SPECIFICALLY EXCLUDE ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS, THEREFORE THEY ARE NOT WAIVED. (ENGLE V. COPENBARGER & COPENBARGER (2007) 157 CAL.APP.4TH 165.) ATTORNEY FEES REASONABLE AND NECESSARY, AND ARE AWARDED IN THE LODESTAR AMOUNT OF $11,645 PLUS $3,137.05 COSTS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARNES, ANITA AS TO DEFENDANT BARHAM, LESLIE BARHAM, LESLIE IN HER REPRESENTATIVE CAPACITY AS A TRUSTEE OF LESLIE J. BARHAM FAMILY PROTECTION TRUST

Ntc Of Mtn For Reasonable Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Dec-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ANITA BARNES Motion for Reasonable Attorneys' Fees and Costs. Appearances: Jeffrey E. Margulies, Esq. of Bravo & Margulies (415) 512-6700 appearing for Defendants and opposing party; Cary S. Kletter, of Kletter Law Firm, (415) 4334-3400 Appearing for Plaintiff and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: MOTION FOR REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SUED UNDER S.F.R.O. SECTION 37.9(a)(8) AND IS THE PREVAILING PARTY, ENTITLING HER TO ATTORNEY FEES. [S.F.R.O. SECTION 37.9(f)]. THE CCP SECTION 998 OFFER DID NOT SPECIFICALLY EXCLUDE ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS, THEREFORE THEY ARE NOT WAIVED. (ENGLE V. COPENBARGER & COPENBARGER (2007) 157 CAL.APP.4TH 165.) ATTORNEY FEES REASONABLE AND NECESSARY, AND ARE AWARDED IN THE LODESTAR AMOUNT OF $11,645 PLUS $3,137.05 COSTS. Order signed in open Court. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Off Calendar Sep-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Defendant To Provide Responses To Discovery And For Attorney's Fees And Costs, is taken Off calendar - settled. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2009 Continued To Oct-16-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Otion To Compel Pltf To Provide Further Responses To Discovery And For Attorney'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Aug-21-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Cary S. Kletter, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Anita Barnes

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Anita Barnes' motion to compel plaintiff [sic] to provide responses to discovery and for attorney's fees and costs denied without prejudice. Although the Court determines the missing date in the text of the notice of motion to be a de minimus error, the notice of motion in its title also misidentifies the party against whom the order is sought. As a result, the cumulative defects require that plaintiff re-notice the motion.
Counsel to re-notice and reserve motion for 9/24/09 at 10:30 a.m. in Dept. 610.
Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
